From UMEME to EACOP.
MEP design. QA/QC.

I’m Nakyeyune Mariam — ERA-licensed Electrical Engineer with 12+ years delivering MEP design, ERA approvals, and QA/QC across Uganda and East Africa. From Uganda’s national power grid at UMEME to the EACOP pipeline, hospitals, government buildings, and high-rise developments. Your project deserves that same standard.

Projects

Real work.
Real buildings. Real pipelines.

Every project below was delivered — approved, on time, to standard. 12 years of engineering across Uganda and East Africa.

EACOP Electrical Room · 2025
ICSS · QA/QC · On Site · 2025–Present
East African Crude Oil Pipeline — Lot 1
QC Supervisor for Integrated Control & Safety Systems on Africa’s longest heated crude oil pipeline. Field surveillance across ICSS, SCADA, fire and gas, telecoms, CCTV, and HVAC at Lot 1 pump stations. Reviewed ITPs and QCPs against AFC-compliant specifications to IEC and NFPA standards.
ICSS / SCADAFire & GasITP / QCP ReviewIEC · NFPA1,443km Pipeline
📍 Uganda · On Site
IGG Headquarters · Kampala
MEP Design & Supervision · 2024–2025 · SMS Construction
IGG Headquarters Building
Part of the electrical design and construction supervision team for the new Inspector General of Government headquarters — a secure, code-compliant government facility. Low-voltage distribution, lighting controls, fire detection systems, ICT/data networks, and energy-efficient electrical layouts across the full building.
LV DistributionFire DetectionICT NetworksAutoCAD MEPERA Approved
📍 Kampala, Uganda
Uganda Management Institute
MEP Design · 2022–2023 · Volted Installations
UMI Multipurpose Hall — 10 Floors
Technical design calculations, MEP drawings, and bills of quantities for the Uganda Management Institute Multipurpose Hall — a 10-floor plus lower and upper ground floor institutional building. Full scope: electrical, mechanical, and plumbing systems across all floors.
10-Floor BuildingAutoCAD MEPBOQFull MEP ScopeDelivered
📍 Kampala, Uganda
UETCL Control Center · Kampala
MEP Rehabilitation · 2022–2024 · Volted Installations
UETCL Control Center — National Electricity Grid
MEP design, rehabilitation, and construction for the Uganda Electricity Transmission Company Control Center — Uganda’s national electricity transmission authority. Renovation and expansion of the operational control infrastructure on 4th Street Industrial Area, Kampala.
MEP RehabilitationNational InfrastructureControl CenterAutoCAD MEPDelivered
📍 Kampala, Uganda
Mbarara Hospital Call Center
Healthcare MEP · 2023–2024 · Volted Installations
Call & Dispatch Center — Mbarara Hospital
Designed MEP systems for the new Call and Dispatch Center at Mbarara Regional Referral Hospital — enhancing emergency communication and response for one of Uganda’s major public health facilities. Reliable electrical and mechanical infrastructure directly supporting patient care and emergency services.
Healthcare MEPEmergency SystemsAutoCAD MEPDelivered
📍 Mbarara, Uganda
MRCC · Mwanza, Tanzania
MEP Design · 2023–2026 · Oubuntu Consulting · Tanzania
Maritime Rescue & Coordination Center — Mwanza
Designed MEP systems for the Lake Victoria Maritime Rescue and Coordination Center in Mwanza, Tanzania. Scope covered electrical distribution, fire alarm, emergency power, plumbing, drainage, and HVAC for 24/7 operational readiness. Delivered through Oubuntu Consulting — extending engineering capability across East Africa.
AutoCAD MEPLife Safety SystemsEmergency PowerTanzaniaDelivered
📍 Mwanza, Tanzania · East Africa

Services

What I deliver

Developer needing ERA approval. Contractor needing QA support. Institution needing full MEP design. I have done it before — I will deliver it right.

📐
MEP Design & Drawings
AutoCAD MEP shop drawings, load schedules, single line diagrams, fire alarm, drainage, plumbing, and as-builts. ERA-ready. Residential to 10-floor institutional buildings.
AutoCAD MEPAll Building TypesERA Ready
⚡
ERA Approval & Compliance
ERA Class B licensed. Zero compliance failures across all delivered projects. First-time approval every time. Permit No. ERA/EIP/CLB/025/9717.
ERA Class B100% Approval RateLicensed
🔍
QA/QC Auditing
ISO 19011 Lead Auditor and ISO 17020 Implementer. Internal and external quality audits for construction and MEP. Site or remote.
ISO 19011ISO 9001NCR Management
🏭
ICSS / SCADA Consulting
Safety Instrumented Systems, ESD, Fire & Gas, and SCADA from Uganda’s two largest oil projects — Tilenga and EACOP.
ICSS / ESDSCADA / SISIEC · NFPA
🗄
CMIMS & Asset Integrity
SAP/UNISOL CMIMS, asset data integrity, and PM logic. 40% rework reduction on Tilenga’s full asset database.
SAP PMData IntegrityRemote Available
🎓
Engineering Training
AutoCAD MEP workshops, QC practices, and inspection fundamentals. Online and in-person. Practical training from someone who has delivered across Uganda and East Africa.
AutoCAD MEPOnline AvailableCPD Hours
